commands.name: new-window
commands.title: New Window
commands.subtitle: Microsoft Edge
commands.description: Open a new Edge Window with profile selection

commands.name: import-from-csv
commands.title: Import Workspaces from Sync Dump
commands.subtitle: Microsoft Edge
commands.description: Import workspaces by parsing a sync-data-dump CSV or XLSX from edge://sync-internals.

commands.name: search-imported-workspaces
commands.title: Search Imported Workspaces
commands.subtitle: Microsoft Edge
commands.description: Browse workspaces and tabs imported from an Edge sync dump.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
